entries.source: "Explain recursion in JavaScript"
entries.value: "Ṣàlàyé recursion nínú JavaScript"

entries.source: "Help debug this error"
entries.value: "Ìrànlọ́wọ́ ṣàwárí aṣiṣe yìí error"

entries.source: "Teach me Python loops"
entries.value: "Teach mi àwọn ìyípo Python"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Code Tutor on inspir for stem learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Ìtọ́sọ́nà tó wúlò fún lílo Olùkọ́ Kóòdù lórí inspir fún ẹ̀kọ́ STEM, pẹ̀lú àwọn ìbéèrè, àwọn ìyípo ẹ̀kọ́, àti àwọn ìwà AI tó ní ààbò síi.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Lágbára síi ìyípo ẹ̀kọ́

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI olùkọ́

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Béèrè fún small àkọ́kọ́ ìgbésẹ̀ dípò ìdáhùn ìkẹyìn.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Béèrè AI láti ṣàyẹ̀wò tirẹ ìrònú, kì í ṣe kan èsì.

entries.source: Beginner and intermediate programmers who need explanations, debugging help, or project coaching.
entries.value: Àwọn tó ń kọ ètò kọ̀ǹpútà ní ìpele ìbẹ̀rẹ̀ àti àárín tí wọ́n nílò àlàyé, ìrànlọ́wọ́ láti ṣàtúnṣe àṣìṣe, tàbí ìtọ́sọ́nà lórí iṣẹ́ àkànṣe.

entries.source: Code Tutor
entries.value: Olùkọ́ni Ìṣètò Kọ̀ǹpútà

entries.source: Code Tutor For Learning Programming By Building is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Understand code, debug errors, learn concepts, and build small projects step by step.
entries.value: Kóòdù olùkọ́ fún ẹ̀kọ́ Programming nípasẹ̀ Building jẹ́ ọ̀nà tó dojú kọ lílo AI fún ẹ̀kọ́ dípò kíkó ìdáhùn jọ lọ́nà aláìṣiṣẹ́. A kọ́ ipo náà yí iṣẹ́ kan pato ká: Lóye kóòdù, ṣàwárí aṣiṣe àwọn aṣiṣe, kọ́ àwọn èrò, àti kọ́ small àwọn iṣẹ́ àkànṣe ìgbésẹ̀ nípasẹ̀ ìgbésẹ̀.

entries.source: Code Tutor For Learning Programming By Building: practical guide
entries.value: Kóòdù olùkọ́ fún ẹ̀kọ́ Programming nípasẹ̀ Building: ìtọ́sọ́nà tó wúlò

entries.source: Explain the bug.
entries.value: Ṣàlàyé bug.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Finish nípasẹ̀ kíkọ èrò back láti ìrántí.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Àwọn ìbéèrè láti gbìmọ̀ wò

entries.source: Start the live mode at Code Tutor. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Project Coach. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ taara ipo ní Code olùkọ́. bí ìwọ fẹ́ neighboring ẹ̀kọ́ fọ́ọ̀mù, gbìyànjú iṣẹ́ àkànṣe olùkọ́. fún gbooro síi ìwòye ti pẹpẹ, ka kí AI ẹ̀kọ́ alábàákẹ́kọ̀ọ́ yẹ kí ṣe fún gbogbo ènìyàn.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell ipo kí ìwọ jẹ́ trying láti kọ́ tàbí produce.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Yẹn ìyàtọ̀ fi hàn up nínú ìṣàn. Instead ti one giant ìdáhùn, tó dára jù àwọn ìpàdé lọ nípasẹ̀ ìyípo: set àfojúsùn, gbìyànjú ohun kan, gba ìdáhùn, túnṣe aláìlera spot, àti yan tó kàn ìgbésẹ̀.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Yẹn focus ṣe pàtàkì. general chatbot lè ìdáhùn fẹ́rẹ̀ẹ́ anything, ṣùgbọ́n ẹ̀kọ́ ipo gives ìjíròrò shape. ó nudges ìwọ toward irú ti thinking, adaṣe, ìdáhùn, tàbí ìṣàwárí yẹn ràn lọ́wọ́ èrò stick.

entries.source: The tutor asks what you expect code to do, then uses small examples and tests to make the behavior click.
entries.value: Olùkọ́ náà yóò béèrè ohun tí o retí pé kí kọ̀ǹpútà náà ṣe, lẹ́yìn náà yóò lo àwọn àpẹẹrẹ kéékèèké àti àwọn ìdánwò láti jẹ́ kí ó yé ọ dáadáa.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Yìí jẹ́ kan náà ìṣe àṣà lẹ́yìn studying pẹ̀lú AI láìsí jìyà ara rẹ: pa mọ́ akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ active. AI jẹ́ jù wúlò nígbà tí ó gives ìwọ ìdáhùn lórí tirẹ thinking.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Yìí ipo jẹ́ pàápàá wúlò fún àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ta fẹ́ láti:

entries.source: Try a small fix.
entries.value: Gbìmọ̀ wò small fix.

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Gbìmọ̀ wò ìgbésẹ̀ ní ọ̀rọ̀ tirẹ.

entries.source: Understand the concept.
entries.value: Lóye èrò.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Lo Olùkọ́ Kóòdù nígbà tí Ìwọ fẹ́ ìpàdé yẹn bẹ̀rẹ̀ yarayara ṣùgbọ́n síbẹ̀ adapts láti ìwọ. àkọ́kọ́ àfojúsùn jẹ́ kì í ṣe láti sound impressive. àkọ́kọ́ àfojúsùn jẹ́ láti ṣe tó kàn ìgbésẹ̀ feel ṣeé ṣe.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Kí yìí ipo ń ràn lọ́wọ́ pẹ̀lú

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Ibo láti go tó kàn

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Ìwọ lè pẹ̀lú bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú àkọ́kọ́ ẹ̀dà ti tirẹ gidi ìṣòro. rúdurùdu àkọ́kọ́ ìbéèrè jẹ́ fine. ìpàdé lè clarify ìpele, olùgbọ́, àkókò ipari, àti style once ìwọ begin.
